roa.docketEntryComment: Minute Order

COURT OF APPEAL Remittitur Received Judgment is MODIFIED TO REFLECT THAT THE CONCURRENT SENTENCES ON COUNTS 4, 5, AND 13 ARE STAYED UNDER SEC.654.  THE JUDGMENT IS MODIFIED TO REFLECT THE IMPOSITION OF A $200 RESTITUTION FINE UNDER SECTION 1202.4 AND A $200 SUSPENDED PAROLE REVOCATION RESTITUTION FINE UNDER SEC. 1202.45.  THE JUDGMENT IS ALSO MODIFIED TO IMPOSE A $40 COURT SECURITY FEE AND A $30 COUR FACILITIES ASSESSMENT PER CONVICTION.  AS MODIFIED, THE JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED.  WE DIRECT THE TRIAL COURT TO AMEND THE ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT TO REFLECT THE MODIFICATIONS, AND TO FORWARD COPIES OF THE AMENDED ABSTRACTS OF JUDGMENT TO THE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION.
